chunks.title: Accession and Early Reign of Joash
chunks.reason: Introduces the king's age, reign duration, family background, and initial piety under Jehoiada.

chunks.title: Restoration of the Temple
chunks.reason: Describes the initiative to repair the temple, the collection of funds, and the completion of the work.

chunks.title: Death of Jehoiada
chunks.reason: Records the death and burial of the high priest who guided Joash.

chunks.title: Joash's Apostasy and Zechariah's Martyrdom
chunks.reason: Details the king's shift in loyalty after Jehoiada's death, the people's idolatry, and the stoning of Zechariah.

chunks.title: Aramean Invasion and Death of Joash
chunks.reason: Narrates the military defeat by Aram, the king's illness, and his assassination by conspirators.

chunks.title: Conspirators and Conclusion
chunks.reason: Lists the names of those who killed Joash and provides a reference to external records for further details.
